runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 13 at this track on June 15 over 1500m, 6 len behind Sam Barows with 54kg at $24.70. The run before that ran last of 12 at Urawa on May 25 over 1500m, 11 len behind For My Dear with 54kg at $13.90. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

runners.name: BRITPOP
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 6 len behind Nyan Moro with 56kg at $19. The race before that 9th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 900m, 6 len behind La Tarantella carrying 55kg at $15.90. Recent form suggests this might be a bit too tough.

runners.name: DONKBET CALL
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 4.5 len behind Nyan Moro with 55kg at $16.90. The start before that 5th of 11 at Funabashi on June 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Earth Blue with 54kg at $10.20. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: PATTSUN DRESS
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 3rd of 12 at Urawa on May 29 over 800m, 3.5 len behind Fortitude with 53kg at $8.10. Second-up raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 11 len behind Nyan Moro carrying 54kg at $4.10. Ready to find peak form.

runners.name: CHINON
runners.comment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation when last of 15 at Nakayama March 15 over 1200m, 15 len behind Higher Mark carrying 55.0kg at $395.50. Previously first up; fourth of 12 at this track January 2 over 900m, 3 len behind Bitter Melon with 53kg at $41.90. Should be right in the mix.

runners.name: MILLION FLIGHT
runners.comment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign by 3 len Urawa March 16 over 800m defeating Opal Green with 53kg at $3.70. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at this track October 13 over 1500m, 69 len behind Ange Luna carrying 54kg at $162.70. Likely to play a major role.

runners.name: KIICHI MILES
runners.comment: Last start ran last of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 42 len behind Nyan Moro carrying 56kg at $151.80. The run before that got back early 6th of 9 at this track on May 12 over 1500m, 4 len behind Blue Moonstone carrying 56kg at $31.20. Faces a tough task.

runners.name: FLOWER GIRL S
runners.comment: At the latest run ran second last of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 12 len behind Nyan Moro with 54kg at $265.70. The start before that ran second last of 12 at this track on May 13 over 900m, 9 len behind La Tarantella with 53kg at $153.70. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

G:QLE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 6. ATOMIC SPIDER turned in a plain effort last time when sixth at this track over 352m behind Little House (20.23) in a Grade 5. Can bounce back. 2. GRANDIOSE GIRL turned spotting a big start finishing eighth (22.61) last time in a Grade 4/5 at this track. In the mix. 5. REDEEMER'S WAY missed the frame latest but had been racing well prior to that including a Grade 5 win two back (16.76) at Q Straight. Can turn it around this time. 4. GOLDSTAR GRACE can find the frame without surprising.

runners.name: MEMORIES OF ROSE
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Parklands (30.69) in a Grade 5, finishing a 10 length seventh. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

runners.name: GOLDSTAR GRACE
runners.comment: At the last outing finished 4th over 300m at Q Straight beaten 3.5 lengths (17.05) behind Cake Is Yummy in a P5 on July 6. Looks a solid hope.

runners.name: TUTA SUN
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.40) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 5.5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: REDEEMER'S WAY
runners.comment: Finished fourth last time but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by a nose in a Grade 5 at Q Straight. Rates on top and can find winning form again.

runners.name: ATOMIC SPIDER
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on June 30 over 352m at this track behind Little House beaten 11 lengths (20.23) in a Grade 5. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

runners.name: BELLA LUNA
runners.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 352m. Solid claims this line-up.

runners.name: GRANDIOSE GIRL
runners.comment: Last start finished last over 390m at this track beaten 8 lengths (22.61) behind Ace Diva in a Grade 4/5 on July 3. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

runners.name: DRINK MOJITOS
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

H:RED:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. PLAYFUL MISS finished fourth last time out, beaten 6 metres, in a nice return to form at this track over 1780m. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position and rates a leading hope in a similar race. 5. SHEREACTS won at this venue two runs ago before a less impressive effort at her latest appearance over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 20 metres. Primary contender if anywhere near her best. 2. LENNY LINCOLN is better than his last-start eighth over 1780m here. Can bounce back from the favourable draw. 6. ZAC DANIELS cannot be left out after solid recent performances, the latest a sound fourth at Albion Park over 1660m. One for the multiples.

runners.name: LENNY LINCOLN
runners.comment: Last start 8th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 16 m by Little Surfer Girl (2:09.20) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $15. At his previous start 7th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track, beaten 4 m by Barrett (2:09.00) in 3yo+ on June 3 at $23. Better than the latest run and from a low draw gets his chance to bounce back.

runners.name: SHEREACTS
runners.comment: Gave plenty of ground last start when eighth after showing early speed, behind Keayang Moscato at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ on June 19 at $41. Raced better the start before that where she won by 1.75 m as favourite (Sr3) at this track (2:09.80) beating Heza Maywyn in 3yo+ on June 12 at $3.20. Better than last start and deserves another chance.

runners.name: ZAC DANIELS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1660m after racing wide at Albion Park, beaten 9 m by Merry Jewel (1:58.60) in 3yo+ on June 22 at $2.80. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 3.5 m by Vinnie Nitro (2:09.50) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $5.50. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: EPIC ERNIE
runners.comment: Returns after 12 weeks in the paddock. Finished off last preparation when tenth behind B Mac C at this track over 2040m in a 3yo+ on April 16 at $41. Sure to go well while fresh.

runners.name: PLAYFUL MISS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 6 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. Before that, was well back in the run when 9th (Fr2) over 2040m at this track, beaten 10 m by Jaccka Cooper (2:33.50) in 3yo+ on June 24 at $61. This looks a nice assignment so watch for a better run.

runners.name: BART BENTLEY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 11 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. Two runs back 9th (Fr2) over 1780m at this track, beaten 30 m by Sir Richard Lee (2:07.60) on November 12 at $31. Strips fitter and can improve enough to play a big role.

runners.name: ROCK IT BABY
runners.comment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 2040m at this track, beaten 8 m by Eternal Bliss (2:32.00) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $61. At his previous start 4th (Sr2) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten 5 m by Jaccka Cooper (2:09.60) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $31. Has ability and can do much better.

runners.name: CAPTAIN FOXTROT
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 9 m by Playful Miss (2:10.00) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $17. At his previous start good run when 3rd (Fr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 1.75 m by Take Out (2:08.00) in 3yo+ on June 10 at $7.50. Can bounce back to best form.

runners.name: SIR BRIGADOON
runners.comment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 15 m by Rock Supreme (1:57.50) on April 11 2025 at $31. Recent trials will help bring him on but a lack of race-fitness might work against.

board.race_name: BEDWELLS FEED BARN YEP GOT CHOOKS MS
GOOD LUCK FRANKIE AND BEN PACE MS

R:BEL:6:2026-07-08.comment: 7. CINQUE STELLE is yet to miss the placings in two starts, including a win on debut two runs back. Resumes from a spell having finished second over 1000m at this track last start as the hot favourite after racing on the speed. Won a recent eight-runner trial over 930m with today's rider William Pike in the saddle and will be sent out as the warm favourite. Should be winning. 2. SILENT DIVA last appeared when finishing fifth of 12 over 1200m at Pinjarra Scarpside four-and-a-half months ago at the only appearance of that prep. Won fresh-up over today's distance in the past and is in the mix.  4. ADMIRE THE GIRL returned from a spell last start and finished a close fourth of eight over 1000m at Northam. She won second-up last prep over 1200m at Ascot and has top-three prospects. 3. NEW TARGET failed to fire last start at this track, finishing last of nine when well supported. In this line-up can atone.

runners.name: CINQUE STELLE
runners.comment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at this track Cl1 February 25 over 1000m, a neck behind Kings Court carrying 57kg at $1.30. At her first start favourite; to post a big 3 len win. This track Mdn February 11 over 1000m defeating Oscars No Grouch with 55kg at $1.45. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Looks a nice horse on the rise and she can return with a bang.

runners.name: SESH
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Sniper's Son carrying 57.5kg at $2.50. The run before that 4th of 8 at this track Cl3 on June 10 over 1000m, slow going 1.75 len behind Mai Aloha carrying 56.5kg at $9. Won't be far away.

runners.name: NEW TARGET
runners.comment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 2nd of 8 at this track Cl3 on June 10 over 1000m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Mai Aloha carrying 55kg at $5.50. Last start ran last of 9 at this track Cl5 on July 1 over 1000m, on heavy track; 4 len behind Under Influence with 56kg at $3. Can bounce back following a disappointing effort last week.

runners.name: SILENT DIVA
runners.comment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 5th of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl1 on February 22 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Just Walter John with 58kg at $8.50. When resuming last campaign 6th of 13 at this track Cl3 F&M on October 22 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Gold Flakes with 55kg at $8. Was runner-up in a trial at Lark Hill on June 15 over 950m. Can return on a positive note.

runners.name: WRITTEN WORDS
runners.comment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 4th in a small field at this track Cl1 on June 3 over 1000m, slow going 3.5 len behind Brazen Butcher with 57kg at $2.05. Second run from a spell 6th of 10 at this track Cl1 on June 17 over 1000m, slow going 3 len behind Busy Fingers carrying 57.5kg at $3.50. Likely improver who is among the main chances.

runners.name: ADMIRE THE GIRL
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after 13 months 4th of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Sniper's Son carrying 58.5kg at $3.70. Previously second-up came from midfield and won by a neck at Ascot Cl1 May 7 2025 over 1200m defeating Countess Of Kenna with 57.5kg at $2.35. Strips fitter and is sure to make her presence felt.

runners.name: GOLD FLAKES
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after seven months raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 10 at this track Grad Hcp 60+ on June 27 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Rock The Market carrying 56kg at $51. Previously second-up 10th of 16 at Ascot Westspeed Plat on October 11 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Surfside Session carrying 57kg at $51. Has failed to show enough over this trip to come into contention here.

runners.name: SOMETHING ROYAL
runners.comment: Last start set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Sniper's Son carrying 55kg at $19. The race before that sat behind the speed prior to fading ran second last of 8 at this track Cl3 on June 10 over 1000m, slow going 9 len behind Mai Aloha with 52.5kg at $41. Still favouring others today.

runners.name: LET'S GO JARPO
runners.comment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Ascot Cl1 April 3 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Rodney Oh Rodney carrying 59kg at $9. On debut third of 15 at this track Mdn December 3 over 1000m, 1.2 len behind Great Promise carrying 58kg at $31. Prefer to watch this time.

runners.name: SUNLIT FRESCO
runners.comment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up led to the turn then faded ran last of 12 at this track Cl3 on June 6 over 1200m, 9 len behind Poblano with 59.5kg at $18. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 6 len behind Sniper's Son with 59kg at $11. Needs to improve sharply.

R:MBS:5:2026-07-08.comment: 5. LADY DIA continues to race well with a win two back here before finishing 1.3 lengths away in third last time over 1100m at this track. Yuji Iwahashi stays on. Should be in the finish. 6. QUATRE BLANCHE reunites with Fuma Ono after scoring with ease over 1000m at this track last time. Has been in solid form this campaign with a win and a placing from three starts. Right in this. 7. ANCIENT ATHENA was a determined maiden winner last time out, scoring by half a length over 1000m at this track. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Looks well placed and she cannot be discounted. 8. DENNO GIRL has started twice, missing the frame on debut then doing a better job to finish second last time over 1100m at this track. Has the pace to be prominent from the outset. Among the chances.

runners.name: TREND LINE
runners.comment: At debut, 5th of 12 at this track on June 25 over 1100m, 6 len behind Kambei with 55kg at $5.30. That race experience to prove invaluable.

runners.name: QUATRE BLANCHE
runners.comment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. At the latest run won by 2 len at this track June 9 over 1000m defeating Mozu Please Go with 55kg at $4.60. Before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at this track on May 26 over 1000m, 10 len behind Rainbow Life carrying 55kg at $28.50. Winning chance again.

runners.name: ANCIENT ATHENA
runners.comment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, sat on the pace before fading 8th of 10 at this track on May 27 over 1000m, 13 len behind Ange Art with 55kg at $4.20. Second-up won by 0.5 len at this track June 23 over 1000m defeating Menkoikoi with 55kg at $19.40. Well-placed and should prove hard to beat.

runners.name: DENNO GIRL
runners.comment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 4th of 12 at this track on June 11 over 1100m, 8 len behind Fight Leve carrying 55kg at $8.10. Second-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track on June 23 over 1100m, 4 len behind Bellagio Chloe with 55kg at $2.40. Big chance.

runners.name: BELLAGIO PALOOZA
runners.comment: Had two starts to date. At very long odds at debut, 7th of 12 at this track on June 11 over 1100m, 15 len behind Fight Leve carrying 54kg at $70.20. Second-up 3rd of 8 at this track on June 23 over 1100m, 7 len behind Bellagio Chloe carrying 54kg at $46.60. Needs something easier.

runners.name: LADY NIKITA
runners.comment: At the latest run led to the turn then faded ran second last of 11 at this track on June 23 over 1000m, 10 len behind Ancient Athena with 55kg at $17. The race before that 6th of 12 at this track on June 9 over 1000m, 6 len behind Quatre Blanche with 55kg at $29.50. Tested on recent form.

runners.name: RIC BELLA
runners.comment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 12 at this track on June 25 over 1100m, 14 len behind Kambei carrying 55kg at $144.90. Didn't quite do enough on debut to raise the hopes.

runners.name: LADY DIA
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Most recently raced on the pace when 3rd of 11 at this track on June 11 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Avenante carrying 55kg at $2.20. The start before that favourite; won by 1.0 len at this track May 26 over 1100m defeating Oryza Nova carrying 55kg at $3.30. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

H:KIL:2:2026-07-08.comment: 3. HEAVENLY FLYER had put together a string of strong performances and maintained the momentum last start when she came from this barrier for second at Shepparton, beaten 2.5 metres. Likely to get the favours from this draw. Deserves a win and could achieve it here. 5. ESTHERS BEST lines up for the first time. By top sire Bettors Delight and hails from the Jake Stockton stable. Has put together a series of nice trial efforts so anticipating a bright start to her career. 9. IM HELLS BELLE missed the start when fourth at her most recent appearance at Shepparton. Still learning but has upside. 8. HEAVENLY NIKKY showed pleasing improvement last time out when runner-up at this circuit and distance. Include.

runners.name: HEAVENLY FLYER
runners.comment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.75 m finishing second behind Heynowheynow at Shepparton over 1690m in a 3yo on June 16 at $1.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second behind The Trawler at Shepparton over 2190m in a 3yo on June 30 at $3.20. Deserves a win and could achieve it aided by a good draw.

runners.name: ESTHERS BEST
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Bettors Delight out of Esthers Light having her first start. Finished third in a trial on July 3 at Riverina Paceway over 1740m. Shaping up nicely.

runners.name: IM HELLS BELLE
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 2190m at Shepparton beaten 25 m by The Trawler (2:45.90) in 3yo on June 30 at $9. Before that, broke in score up and was out of position at the start 10th (Fr2) over 1690m at Shepparton beaten 60 m by Major Eastwood (2:02.70) on June 23 at $5.50. Contender.

runners.name: TAKAO
runners.comment: Racing consistently with minor placings at his last two starts at this course. Placed last start 3rd (Fr1) over 1690m at this track was 2nd-4.06 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Bungy (2:05.00) on July 2 at $7.50. Before that 2nd (Fr1) over 1690m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 4.83 beaten 1.4 m by Sweet Gem (2:06.00) on June 18 at $13. Draws wider so place best.

runners.name: ELLIANA
runners.comment: Last start 7th (Fr1) over 2190m after showing early pace at Shepparton, beaten 45 m by The Trawler (2:45.90) in 3yo on June 30 at $9.50. Before that, 4th (Fr6) over 1690m at Shepparton, at the bell was 7th-19.7 beaten 9 m by Major Eastwood (2:02.70) on June 23 at $23. Contender.

runners.name: HEAVENLY NIKKY
runners.comment: Improved last start with a solid effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr6) over 1690m at this track was 6th-8.89 at the bell, beaten 1.2 m by Alloa (2:09.20) on July 2 at $15. Should be in the mix again.

runners.name: OHSO HANDSOME
runners.comment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 8th (Fr1) over 1710m at Ballarat beaten 15 m by Springfield River (2:04.30) in 2yo on November 27 at $12. Draws well so watch the market.

runners.name: LAMBRO BUOY
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr6) over 1785m at Stawell, beaten 40 m by Art Of The Storm (2:14.30) on June 1 at $16. At the start before was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr4) over 1780m after showing early speed and racing wide at Mt Gambier, beaten 20 m by Remarli (2:13.80) on May 12 at $3.90. May improve.

runners.name: ASHANTE CADMAN
runners.comment: Second up after running 5th (Sr1) over 1690m at this track was 5th-8.63 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Alloa (2:09.20) on July 2 at $71. Not keen.

G:TRE:9:2026-07-08.comment: 5. REEL 'EM HARADA turned in a plain performance last time when fifth at this track over 300m behind Federal Mercury (18.07) in a Grade 5. Was a winner prior to that. The form out of her last race has been franked. Has claims if she runs up to expectations. 4. SMOKE AND FLAME has not raced since scoring (18.13) over 300m at this track four months ago. Meets a moderate line up and should run well. 2. KINGSBRAE MAGGIE was the early leader but copped a bump in the run, boxing on well to finish a 3.5 lengths second (17.62) in a Grade 4 at this track. Expected to feature. 1. TRALEE DIGBY must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.

runners.name: KINGSBRAE MAGGIE
runners.comment: Ran a better race when second behind Amazing Bundy at this track last start over 300m (17.62). Has to be included.

runners.name: TRALEE DIGBY
runners.comment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recently finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 5 lengths (17.93) behind Big Cutie in a Grade 5 on June 27. Solid claims this line-up.

runners.name: LIPSCHITZ
runners.comment: At the last start finished 6th over 400m at The Gardens beaten 6 lengths (24.01) behind Blue Legend in a Grade 5 on July 3. Top-three hope with the right run.

runners.name: REEL 'EM HARADA
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 5th on June 24 over 300m at this track behind Federal Mercury beaten 7 lengths (18.07) in a Grade 5. Has an exceptional 17.34 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

runners.name: FABULOUS FLAME
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 7 lengths behind She's Silky over 300m. Has ability and worth including.

runners.name: LAST SHOT RIPPER
runners.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 11 length sixth over 300m at this track. Tested under these conditions.

runners.name: SMOKE AND FLAME
runners.comment: Returns from a four months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (18.13) over 300m at this track. Can return in winning form.

runners.name: SEA SHINE
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at The Gardens. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

runners.name: MULWEE PRINCESS
runners.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 8 length fifth over 300m at this track. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

runners.name: BLUE WIGGLE
runners.comment: Has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Prepared to risk.

R:DAR:6:2026-07-08.comment: The 55K Palmerston Cup is a great way to finish the meeting, and 5. ROCK REVOLUTION was brave in defeat against most of these when setting the pace before being overhauled late by the top weight here 11 days ago. He will be trying similar front-running tactics this time, and he can go one better. 2. REMATCH is a quality gelding who has recently relocated from NSW, and he made an encouraging local debut over an unsuitable 1300m. He is expected to improve sharply, stepping up in distance, and he has never missed a cheque second up in the past, including a win. Stick with him. 4. VANGUARD LEGEND was not far away in the same race as the top pick and, with a more favourable draw this time, he looks capable of a top 3 finish. 3. HETTINGER will be peaking at the right time, and he boasts an excellent record over this course and distance and is too good to overlook, while 1. ICHIBAN is chasing consecutive wins after a determined last-start win in a similar field. Don't risk him.

runners.name: ICHIBAN
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 len at this track Bm76 June 27 over 1600m defeating Rock Revolution carrying 59kg at $2.20. The start before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at this track 0 - 70 on June 13 over 1300m, 1.75 len behind Orion The Hunter with 61kg at $7. Going well and can keep the ball rolling.

runners.name: VANGUARD LEGEND
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 8 at this track Bm76 on June 27 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Ichiban with 59kg at $6.50. The run before that 8th of 12 at Alice Springs Alice Cup on May 4 over 2000m, 8 len behind Magic Defense with 54kg at $6.50. Great record here and drawn to feature.

runners.name: HETTINGER
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 9 at this track Bm76 on June 20 over 1300m, 3 len behind Shisuta Bo with 58.5kg at $11. Before that ran second last of 11 at Seymour Bm62 on May 21 over 1200m, slow going 11 len behind Thinxzo carrying 62kg at $101. Top record course and distance and looks hard to beat on his best form.

runners.name: ROCK REVOLUTION
runners.comment: Most recently set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at this track Bm76 on June 27 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Ichiban carrying 57.5kg at $6.50. The start before that raced on the pace before fading 10th of 12 at Alice Springs 0 - 70 on May 4 over 2000m, 16 len behind Figo The Great carrying 60.5kg at $4. Working up to a win. Speedy galloper in great form and is the one to run down.

runners.name: OUR COUVER
runners.comment: Last start 7th of 9 at this track 0 - 70 on June 13 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Orion The Hunter carrying 60.5kg at $7. The start before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Alice Springs Bm76 on May 30 over 1400m, 3 len behind Venting with 55.5kg at $3.30. Going better than firm suggests and has to be included.

runners.name: REMATCH
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after six months 5th of 9 at this track Bm76 on June 20 over 1300m, 4 len behind Shisuta Bo carrying 59kg at $10. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; 2nd of 13 at Mudgee Mudgee Cup Mb79 on December 5 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Dances With Hooves carrying 58kg at $3.80. Fitter for the first try this area and will relish the extra ground.

runners.name: VIERI
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after three months eased back early on 7th of 9 at this track Bm76 on June 20 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Shisuta Bo with 54kg at $11. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on May 10 2025 over 1100m, 4 len behind Tugela Falls with 58.5kg at $2.15. Others make more appeal.

runners.name: KING AKEED
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up won by a head at this track 0 - 64 June 6 over 1200m defeating Brazen Bon with 59.5kg at $7. Last start 3rd of 9 at this track Bm76 on June 20 over 1300m, 2.25 len behind Shisuta Bo with 55kg at $5. First try at the mile and has the job ahead this time.

G:BEN:12:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ENERGISER DASH comes off an average run last start when seventh at this track over 425m behind Rae's Rainbow (24.90) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Should bounce back. 8. PAW INGRID is a capable type and proved too classy last time to win by a nose at Geelong in a handy 22.90 beating Aston Transcend. Can make it back-to-back wins. 2. MCIVOR JEWELS has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing sixth (24.88) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 at this track. Solid record here at the distance winning three races. Warrants plenty of respect. 3. DERNANCOURT cannot be left out after placing last start.

runners.name: MCIVOR JEWELS
runners.comment: Last start finished 6th in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1 over 425m at this track behind Rae's Rainbow beaten 6 lengths (24.88). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

runners.name: JACK'S REGRET
runners.comment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by a long neck at this track (24.50) beating Zipping Scooby in a Grade 5 on June 17. Capable of taking this out.

runners.name: ZIPPING SCOOBY
runners.comment: Most recent effort finished 4th over 400m at Geelong beaten 6 lengths (23.20) behind Mandolin Storm in a Grade 5 on July 4. Solid showing expected.

runners.name: STELLA ROSE
runners.comment: Finished third last time (24.81) over 425m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

runners.name: PAW INGRID
runners.comment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 400m at Geelong by a nose in a Grade 5. Expected to measure up again.

runners.name: DERNANCOURT
runners.comment: Ran a better race when second behind Chain Drive at this track last start over 425m (24.71). Has to be included.

runners.name: ENERGISER DASH
runners.comment: Missed the frame latest (24.90) when seventh over 425m at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Leading player.

runners.name: SLINGER
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (24.86) over 425m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

ref.race_name: BEDWELLS FEED BARN YEP GOT CHOOKS MS

H:BAT:3:2026-07-08.comment: 4. MEMPHIS FURY didn't have a lot go to plan last week but had won twice in a row prior, one of them at this circuit and distance. Returns to the front row so could bounce back. 10. MCLEAN dug deep to find winning from at this circuit and distance last week. Tougher draw here but he is going well. 9. IDEAL TIMING goes up in grade but draws for a trail and is hard to overlook after scoring first-up last start by 9.5 metres at this circuit and distance. 7. BORROWED TIME should find this easier than the last attempt in the city and was racing well with a string of wins and placings prior.

runners.name: BORROWED TIME

Showed ability the outing before when he won by 1.1 m (Sr1) at this track (2:46.40) beating Im Desirable in on June 17 at $9.50 at the bell was leading 1.22. Better placed so can bounce back.

runners.name: REBOUNDER
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr7) over 2260m after racing wide at this track, at the bell was 10th-15.35 beaten 9 m by Borrowed Time (2:46.40) on June 17 at $8.50. At his previous start was well back in the run when 8th (Fr5) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 10th-17.9 beaten 12 m by Alfnalma (2:02.80) on June 10 at $15. Draws for a better showing.

runners.name: MEMPHIS FURY
runners.comment: Beaten favourite last start when seventh at this track on July 1. Won the start before at this track on June 24. Leading contender.

runners.name: MCLEAN
runners.comment: Last start raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:03.20) beating The Swift One in on July 1 at $9.50 at the bell was 2nd-5.06. Tougher draw but can make an impact again.

runners.name: IDEAL TIMING
runners.comment: Last start won by 9 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at this track (2:03.00) beating Indasky in on July 1 at $9.50 at the bell was 2nd-2.25. Draws for a trail so could strike again.

runners.name: RIKIBREAL
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 1730m at this track, beaten 14 m by Tapaganoosh (2:04.40) in NR up to 61 on May 20 at $4.60. At the start before 5th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 4th-7.72 beaten 6 m by Buddy Brilliance (2:03.20) on May 13 at $5.50. Fitter and draws well so a much better run is on the cards.

runners.name: SAINT VERAN
runners.comment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1730m at this track, beaten 21 m by Baxter Red (2:01.90) on June 17 at $23. At the start before 6th (Fr5) over 1730m at this track was 4th-5.38 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Nicely Spoken (2:05.40) on June 3 at $9.50. This looks more suitable so may show more.

runners.name: BETTORS HOPE
runners.comment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten this track over 2260m, 7 days ago and two back was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1740m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 9th-11.9 beaten 13 m by Rocky Rocks (2:06.00) on June 23 at $18. The ace draw may see improvement.

runners.name: BETTER SHUSH
runners.comment: Didn't do much last time out, was well back in the run when 9th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track was 3rd-5.2 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Mclean (2:03.20) on July 1 at $26. Before that was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-13.29 beaten 19 m by Memphis Fury (2:03.60) on June 24 at $18. Others rate better.

runners.name: THE SWIFT ONE
runners.comment: Last start 2nd (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track was leading by 5.06 at the bell, beaten a nose by Mclean (2:03.20) on July 1 at $3.80.

R:KAW:5:2026-07-08.comment: 1. GRAND MERMAID is a talented galloper who is unbeaten from two runs, the latest success coming over 900m at this track. Had plenty on her rivals last time and will go well again. 7. MILLION FLIGHT last appeared when she saluted over 800m at Urawa on March 16. One of the genuine hopes in the race. 3. KING SUKEYO missed the placings two starts back when resuming then ran a better race and finished 2.75 lengths away in fourth last time out over 900m at this track after being prominent at the bend. Nicely placed to take this out. 2. PATTSUN DRESS ran below expectations last time at this track, finishing eighth and beaten 11 lengths. Nicely placed to make amends.

runners.name: GRAND MERMAID
runners.comment: Looking to keep her unbeaten record intact. At long odds on debut, won by 1.5 len at this track May 15 over 900m defeating Sound Primo carrying 54kg at $38.30. Last start won by 2 len at this track June 15 over 900m defeating Gigantomachia carrying 54kg at $3.30. Going well enough to take this out.

runners.name: KING SUKEYO
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 8th of 11 at Funabashi on June 1 over 1200m, 5 len behind Earth Blue with 56kg at $61. Second run from a spell crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 4th of 12 at this track on June 15 over 900m, 2.75 len behind Grand Mermaid carrying 56kg at $3. Forward showing expected.

runners.name: MONGE TIME
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 13 at this track on June 15 over 1500m, 13 len behind Sam Barows with 56kg at $40.30. The start before that 5th of 12 at Urawa on May 25 over 1500m, 3 len behind For My Dear carrying 56kg at $44.30. Not doing enough to threaten the top few today.

runners.name: LA SEULE FLEUR
runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 13 at this track on June 15 over 1500m, 6 len behind Sam Barows with 54kg at $24.70. The run before that ran last of 12 at Urawa on May 25 over 1500m, 11 len behind For My Dear with 54kg at $13.90. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

runners.name: BRITPOP
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 6 len behind Nyan Moro with 56kg at $19. The race before that 9th of 12 at this track on May 13 over 900m, 6 len behind La Tarantella carrying 55kg at $15.90. Recent form suggests this might be a bit too tough.

runners.name: DONKBET CALL
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 4.5 len behind Nyan Moro with 55kg at $16.90. The start before that 5th of 11 at Funabashi on June 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Earth Blue with 54kg at $10.20. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: PATTSUN DRESS
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 3rd of 12 at Urawa on May 29 over 800m, 3.5 len behind Fortitude with 53kg at $8.10. Second-up raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 11 len behind Nyan Moro carrying 54kg at $4.10. Ready to find peak form.

runners.name: CHINON
runners.comment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation when last of 15 at Nakayama March 15 over 1200m, 15 len behind Higher Mark carrying 55.0kg at $395.50. Previously first up; fourth of 12 at this track January 2 over 900m, 3 len behind Bitter Melon with 53kg at $41.90. Should be right in the mix.

runners.name: MILLION FLIGHT
runners.comment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign by 3 len Urawa March 16 over 800m defeating Opal Green with 53kg at $3.70. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at this track October 13 over 1500m, 69 len behind Ange Luna carrying 54kg at $162.70. Likely to play a major role.

runners.name: KIICHI MILES
runners.comment: Last start ran last of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 42 len behind Nyan Moro carrying 56kg at $151.80. The run before that got back early 6th of 9 at this track on May 12 over 1500m, 4 len behind Blue Moonstone carrying 56kg at $31.20. Faces a tough task.

runners.name: FLOWER GIRL S
runners.comment: At the latest run ran second last of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 12 len behind Nyan Moro with 54kg at $265.70. The start before that ran second last of 12 at this track on May 13 over 900m, 9 len behind La Tarantella with 53kg at $153.70. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

G:QLE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 6. ATOMIC SPIDER turned in a plain effort last time when sixth at this track over 352m behind Little House (20.23) in a Grade 5. Can bounce back. 2. GRANDIOSE GIRL turned spotting a big start finishing eighth (22.61) last time in a Grade 4/5 at this track. In the mix. 5. REDEEMER'S WAY missed the frame latest but had been racing well prior to that including a Grade 5 win two back (16.76) at Q Straight. Can turn it around this time. 4. GOLDSTAR GRACE can find the frame without surprising.

runners.name: MEMORIES OF ROSE
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Parklands (30.69) in a Grade 5, finishing a 10 length seventh. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

runners.name: GOLDSTAR GRACE
runners.comment: At the last outing finished 4th over 300m at Q Straight beaten 3.5 lengths (17.05) behind Cake Is Yummy in a P5 on July 6. Looks a solid hope.

runners.name: TUTA SUN
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.40) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 5.5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: REDEEMER'S WAY
runners.comment: Finished fourth last time but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by a nose in a Grade 5 at Q Straight. Rates on top and can find winning form again.

runners.name: ATOMIC SPIDER
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on June 30 over 352m at this track behind Little House beaten 11 lengths (20.23) in a Grade 5. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

runners.name: BELLA LUNA
runners.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 352m. Solid claims this line-up.

runners.name: GRANDIOSE GIRL
runners.comment: Last start finished last over 390m at this track beaten 8 lengths (22.61) behind Ace Diva in a Grade 4/5 on July 3. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

runners.name: DRINK MOJITOS
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

H:RED:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. PLAYFUL MISS finished fourth last time out, beaten 6 metres, in a nice return to form at this track over 1780m. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position and rates a leading hope in a similar race. 5. SHEREACTS won at this venue two runs ago before a less impressive effort at her latest appearance over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 20 metres. Primary contender if anywhere near her best. 2. LENNY LINCOLN is better than his last-start eighth over 1780m here. Can bounce back from the favourable draw. 6. ZAC DANIELS cannot be left out after solid recent performances, the latest a sound fourth at Albion Park over 1660m. One for the multiples.

runners.name: LENNY LINCOLN
runners.comment: Last start 8th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 16 m by Little Surfer Girl (2:09.20) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $15. At his previous start 7th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track, beaten 4 m by Barrett (2:09.00) in 3yo+ on June 3 at $23. Better than the latest run and from a low draw gets his chance to bounce back.

runners.name: SHEREACTS
runners.comment: Gave plenty of ground last start when eighth after showing early speed, behind Keayang Moscato at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ on June 19 at $41. Raced better the start before that where she won by 1.75 m as favourite (Sr3) at this track (2:09.80) beating Heza Maywyn in 3yo+ on June 12 at $3.20. Better than last start and deserves another chance.

runners.name: ZAC DANIELS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1660m after racing wide at Albion Park, beaten 9 m by Merry Jewel (1:58.60) in 3yo+ on June 22 at $2.80. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 3.5 m by Vinnie Nitro (2:09.50) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $5.50. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: EPIC ERNIE
runners.comment: Returns after 12 weeks in the paddock. Finished off last preparation when tenth behind B Mac C at this track over 2040m in a 3yo+ on April 16 at $41. Sure to go well while fresh.

runners.name: PLAYFUL MISS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 6 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. Before that, was well back in the run when 9th (Fr2) over 2040m at this track, beaten 10 m by Jaccka Cooper (2:33.50) in 3yo+ on June 24 at $61. This looks a nice assignment so watch for a better run.

runners.name: BART BENTLEY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 11 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. Two runs back 9th (Fr2) over 1780m at this track, beaten 30 m by Sir Richard Lee (2:07.60) on November 12 at $31. Strips fitter and can improve enough to play a big role.

runners.name: ROCK IT BABY
runners.comment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 2040m at this track, beaten 8 m by Eternal Bliss (2:32.00) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $61. At his previous start 4th (Sr2) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten 5 m by Jaccka Cooper (2:09.60) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $31. Has ability and can do much better.

runners.name: CAPTAIN FOXTROT
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 9 m by Playful Miss (2:10.00) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $17. At his previous start good run when 3rd (Fr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 1.75 m by Take Out (2:08.00) in 3yo+ on June 10 at $7.50. Can bounce back to best form.

runners.name: SIR BRIGADOON
runners.comment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 15 m by Rock Supreme (1:57.50) on April 11 2025 at $31. Recent trials will help bring him on but a lack of race-fitness might work against.

R:BEL:6:2026-07-08.comment: 7. CINQUE STELLE is yet to miss the placings in two starts, including a win on debut two runs back. Resumes from a spell having finished second over 1000m at this track last start as the hot favourite after racing on the speed. Won a recent eight-runner trial over 930m with today's rider William Pike in the saddle and will be sent out as the warm favourite. Should be winning. 2. SILENT DIVA last appeared when finishing fifth of 12 over 1200m at Pinjarra Scarpside four-and-a-half months ago at the only appearance of that prep. Won fresh-up over today's distance in the past and is in the mix.  4. ADMIRE THE GIRL returned from a spell last start and finished a close fourth of eight over 1000m at Northam. She won second-up last prep over 1200m at Ascot and has top-three prospects. 3. NEW TARGET failed to fire last start at this track, finishing last of nine when well supported. In this line-up can atone.

runners.name: CINQUE STELLE
runners.comment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at this track Cl1 February 25 over 1000m, a neck behind Kings Court carrying 57kg at $1.30. At her first start favourite; to post a big 3 len win. This track Mdn February 11 over 1000m defeating Oscars No Grouch with 55kg at $1.45. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Looks a nice horse on the rise and she can return with a bang.

runners.name: SESH
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Sniper's Son carrying 57.5kg at $2.50. The run before that 4th of 8 at this track Cl3 on June 10 over 1000m, slow going 1.75 len behind Mai Aloha carrying 56.5kg at $9. Won't be far away.

runners.name: NEW TARGET
runners.comment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 2nd of 8 at this track Cl3 on June 10 over 1000m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Mai Aloha carrying 55kg at $5.50. Last start ran last of 9 at this track Cl5 on July 1 over 1000m, on heavy track; 4 len behind Under Influence with 56kg at $3. Can bounce back following a disappointing effort last week.

runners.name: SILENT DIVA
runners.comment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 5th of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl1 on February 22 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Just Walter John with 58kg at $8.50. When resuming last campaign 6th of 13 at this track Cl3 F&M on October 22 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Gold Flakes with 55kg at $8. Was runner-up in a trial at Lark Hill on June 15 over 950m. Can return on a positive note.

runners.name: WRITTEN WORDS
runners.comment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 4th in a small field at this track Cl1 on June 3 over 1000m, slow going 3.5 len behind Brazen Butcher with 57kg at $2.05. Second run from a spell 6th of 10 at this track Cl1 on June 17 over 1000m, slow going 3 len behind Busy Fingers carrying 57.5kg at $3.50. Likely improver who is among the main chances.

runners.name: ADMIRE THE GIRL
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after 13 months 4th of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Sniper's Son carrying 58.5kg at $3.70. Previously second-up came from midfield and won by a neck at Ascot Cl1 May 7 2025 over 1200m defeating Countess Of Kenna with 57.5kg at $2.35. Strips fitter and is sure to make her presence felt.

runners.name: GOLD FLAKES
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after seven months raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 10 at this track Grad Hcp 60+ on June 27 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Rock The Market carrying 56kg at $51. Previously second-up 10th of 16 at Ascot Westspeed Plat on October 11 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Surfside Session carrying 57kg at $51. Has failed to show enough over this trip to come into contention here.

runners.name: SOMETHING ROYAL
runners.comment: Last start set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Sniper's Son carrying 55kg at $19. The race before that sat behind the speed prior to fading ran second last of 8 at this track Cl3 on June 10 over 1000m, slow going 9 len behind Mai Aloha with 52.5kg at $41. Still favouring others today.

runners.name: LET'S GO JARPO
runners.comment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Ascot Cl1 April 3 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Rodney Oh Rodney carrying 59kg at $9. On debut third of 15 at this track Mdn December 3 over 1000m, 1.2 len behind Great Promise carrying 58kg at $31. Prefer to watch this time.

runners.name: SUNLIT FRESCO
runners.comment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up led to the turn then faded ran last of 12 at this track Cl3 on June 6 over 1200m, 9 len behind Poblano with 59.5kg at $18. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 6 len behind Sniper's Son with 59kg at $11. Needs to improve sharply.

R:MBS:5:2026-07-08.comment: 5. LADY DIA continues to race well with a win two back here before finishing 1.3 lengths away in third last time over 1100m at this track. Yuji Iwahashi stays on. Should be in the finish. 6. QUATRE BLANCHE reunites with Fuma Ono after scoring with ease over 1000m at this track last time. Has been in solid form this campaign with a win and a placing from three starts. Right in this. 7. ANCIENT ATHENA was a determined maiden winner last time out, scoring by half a length over 1000m at this track. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Looks well placed and she cannot be discounted. 8. DENNO GIRL has started twice, missing the frame on debut then doing a better job to finish second last time over 1100m at this track. Has the pace to be prominent from the outset. Among the chances.

runners.name: TREND LINE
runners.comment: At debut, 5th of 12 at this track on June 25 over 1100m, 6 len behind Kambei with 55kg at $5.30. That race experience to prove invaluable.

runners.name: QUATRE BLANCHE
runners.comment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. At the latest run won by 2 len at this track June 9 over 1000m defeating Mozu Please Go with 55kg at $4.60. Before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at this track on May 26 over 1000m, 10 len behind Rainbow Life carrying 55kg at $28.50. Winning chance again.

runners.name: ANCIENT ATHENA
runners.comment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, sat on the pace before fading 8th of 10 at this track on May 27 over 1000m, 13 len behind Ange Art with 55kg at $4.20. Second-up won by 0.5 len at this track June 23 over 1000m defeating Menkoikoi with 55kg at $19.40. Well-placed and should prove hard to beat.

runners.name: DENNO GIRL
runners.comment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 4th of 12 at this track on June 11 over 1100m, 8 len behind Fight Leve carrying 55kg at $8.10. Second-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track on June 23 over 1100m, 4 len behind Bellagio Chloe with 55kg at $2.40. Big chance.

runners.name: BELLAGIO PALOOZA
runners.comment: Had two starts to date. At very long odds at debut, 7th of 12 at this track on June 11 over 1100m, 15 len behind Fight Leve carrying 54kg at $70.20. Second-up 3rd of 8 at this track on June 23 over 1100m, 7 len behind Bellagio Chloe carrying 54kg at $46.60. Needs something easier.

runners.name: LADY NIKITA
runners.comment: At the latest run led to the turn then faded ran second last of 11 at this track on June 23 over 1000m, 10 len behind Ancient Athena with 55kg at $17. The race before that 6th of 12 at this track on June 9 over 1000m, 6 len behind Quatre Blanche with 55kg at $29.50. Tested on recent form.

runners.name: RIC BELLA
runners.comment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 12 at this track on June 25 over 1100m, 14 len behind Kambei carrying 55kg at $144.90. Didn't quite do enough on debut to raise the hopes.

runners.name: LADY DIA
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Most recently raced on the pace when 3rd of 11 at this track on June 11 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Avenante carrying 55kg at $2.20. The start before that favourite; won by 1.0 len at this track May 26 over 1100m defeating Oryza Nova carrying 55kg at $3.30. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

H:KIL:2:2026-07-08.comment: 3. HEAVENLY FLYER had put together a string of strong performances and maintained the momentum last start when she came from this barrier for second at Shepparton, beaten 2.5 metres. Likely to get the favours from this draw. Deserves a win and could achieve it here. 5. ESTHERS BEST lines up for the first time. By top sire Bettors Delight and hails from the Jake Stockton stable. Has put together a series of nice trial efforts so anticipating a bright start to her career. 9. IM HELLS BELLE missed the start when fourth at her most recent appearance at Shepparton. Still learning but has upside. 8. HEAVENLY NIKKY showed pleasing improvement last time out when runner-up at this circuit and distance. Include.

runners.name: HEAVENLY FLYER
runners.comment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.75 m finishing second behind Heynowheynow at Shepparton over 1690m in a 3yo on June 16 at $1.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second behind The Trawler at Shepparton over 2190m in a 3yo on June 30 at $3.20. Deserves a win and could achieve it aided by a good draw.

runners.name: ESTHERS BEST
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Bettors Delight out of Esthers Light having her first start. Finished third in a trial on July 3 at Riverina Paceway over 1740m. Shaping up nicely.

runners.name: IM HELLS BELLE
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 2190m at Shepparton beaten 25 m by The Trawler (2:45.90) in 3yo on June 30 at $9. Before that, broke in score up and was out of position at the start 10th (Fr2) over 1690m at Shepparton beaten 60 m by Major Eastwood (2:02.70) on June 23 at $5.50. Contender.

runners.name: TAKAO
runners.comment: Racing consistently with minor placings at his last two starts at this course. runners.name: BLUE WIGGLE
runners.comment: Has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Prepared to risk.

R:DAR:6:2026-07-08.comment: The 55K Palmerston Cup is a great way to finish the meeting, and 5. ROCK REVOLUTION was brave in defeat against most of these when setting the pace before being overhauled late by the top weight here 11 days ago. He will be trying similar front-running tactics this time, and he can go one better. 2. REMATCH is a quality gelding who has recently relocated from NSW, and he made an encouraging local debut over an unsuitable 1300m. He is expected to improve sharply, stepping up in distance, and he has never missed a cheque second up in the past, including a win. Stick with him. 4. VANGUARD LEGEND was not far away in the same race as the top pick and, with a more favourable draw this time, he looks capable of a top 3 finish. 3. HETTINGER will be peaking at the right time, and he boasts an excellent record over this course and distance and is too good to overlook, while 1. ICHIBAN is chasing consecutive wins after a determined last-start win in a similar field. Don't risk him.

runners.name: ICHIBAN
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 len at this track Bm76 June 27 over 1600m defeating Rock Revolution carrying 59kg at $2.20. The start before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at this track 0 - 70 on June 13 over 1300m, 1.75 len behind Orion The Hunter with 61kg at $7. Going well and can keep the ball rolling.

runners.name: VANGUARD LEGEND
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 8 at this track Bm76 on June 27 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Ichiban with 59kg at $6.50. The run before that 8th of 12 at Alice Springs Alice Cup on May 4 over 2000m, 8 len behind Magic Defense with 54kg at $6.50. Great record here and drawn to feature.

runners.name: HETTINGER
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 9 at this track Bm76 on June 20 over 1300m, 3 len behind Shisuta Bo with 58.5kg at $11. Before that ran second last of 11 at Seymour Bm62 on May 21 over 1200m, slow going 11 len behind Thinxzo carrying 62kg at $101. Top record course and distance and looks hard to beat on his best form.

runners.name: ROCK REVOLUTION

The start before that raced on the pace before fading 10th of 12 at Alice Springs 0 - 70 on May 4 over 2000m, 16 len behind Figo The Great carrying 60.5kg at $4. Working up to a win. Speedy galloper in great form and is the one to run down.

runners.name: OUR COUVER
runners.comment: Last start 7th of 9 at this track 0 - 70 on June 13 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Orion The Hunter carrying 60.5kg at $7. Going better than firm suggests and has to be included.

Previously second-up made ground from midfield; 2nd of 13 at Mudgee Mudgee Cup Mb79 on December 5 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Dances With Hooves carrying 58kg at $3.80. Fitter for the first try this area and will relish the extra ground.

runners.name: VIERI

Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on May 10 2025 over 1100m, 4 len behind Tugela Falls with 58.5kg at $2.15. Others make more appeal.

PAW INGRID is a capable type and proved too classy last time to win by a nose at Geelong in a handy 22.90 beating Aston Transcend. Can make it back-to-back wins. 2. MCIVOR JEWELS has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing sixth (24.88) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 at this track. Solid record here at the distance winning three races. Warrants plenty of respect. 3. DERNANCOURT cannot be left out after placing last start.

runners.comment: Last start finished 6th in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1 over 425m at this track behind Rae's Rainbow beaten 6 lengths (24.88). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

runners.name: ZIPPING SCOOBY
runners.comment: Most recent effort finished 4th over 400m at Geelong beaten 6 lengths (23.20) behind Mandolin Storm in a Grade 5 on July 4. Solid showing expected.

runners.name: STELLA ROSE
runners.comment: Finished third last time (24.81) over 425m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

runners.name: PAW INGRID
runners.comment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 400m at Geelong by a nose in a Grade 5. Expected to measure up again.

runners.name: DERNANCOURT

runners.name: ENERGISER DASH

Nicely placed to take this out. 2. PATTSUN DRESS ran below expectations last time at this track, finishing eighth and beaten 11 lengths. Nicely placed to make amends.

runners.comment: Last start ran last of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 42 len behind Nyan Moro carrying 56kg at $151.80. The run before that got back early 6th of 9 at this track on May 12 over 1500m, 4 len behind Blue Moonstone carrying 56kg at $31.20. Faces a tough task.

runners.name: FLOWER GIRL S
runners.comment: At the latest run ran second last of 10 at this track on June 18 over 900m, 12 len behind Nyan Moro with 54kg at $265.70. The start before that ran second last of 12 at this track on May 13 over 900m, 9 len behind La Tarantella with 53kg at $153.70. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

G:QLE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 6. ATOMIC SPIDER turned in a plain effort last time when sixth at this track over 352m behind Little House (20.23) in a Grade 5. Can bounce back. 2. runners.name: DRINK MOJITOS
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

SHEREACTS won at this venue two runs ago before a less impressive effort at her latest appearance over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 20 metres. Primary contender if anywhere near her best. 2. R:BEL:6:2026-07-08.comment: 7. CINQUE STELLE is yet to miss the placings in two starts, including a win on debut two runs back. Resumes from a spell having finished second over 1000m at this track last start as the hot favourite after racing on the speed. Won a recent eight-runner trial over 930m with today's rider William Pike in the saddle and will be sent out as the warm favourite. Should be winning. 2. SILENT DIVA last appeared when finishing fifth of 12 over 1200m at Pinjarra Scarpside four-and-a-half months ago at the only appearance of that prep. Won fresh-up over today's distance in the past and is in the mix.  4. ADMIRE THE GIRL returned from a spell last start and finished a close fourth of eight over 1000m at Northam. She won second-up last prep over 1200m at Ascot and has top-three prospects. 3. NEW TARGET failed to fire last start at this track, finishing last of nine when well supported. In this line-up can atone.

runners.name: CINQUE STELLE
runners.comment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at this track Cl1 February 25 over 1000m, a neck behind Kings Court carrying 57kg at $1.30. At her first start favourite; to post a big 3 len win. This track Mdn February 11 over 1000m defeating Oscars No Grouch with 55kg at $1.45. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Looks a nice horse on the rise and she can return with a bang.

runners.comment: Recent form sound. Most recently 3rd of 8 at Northam Cl3 on June 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Sniper's Son carrying 57.5kg at $2.50. R:DAR:6:2026-07-08.comment: The 55K Palmerston Cup is a great way to finish the meeting, and 5. ROCK REVOLUTION was brave in defeat against most of these when setting the pace before being overhauled late by the top weight here 11 days ago. He will be trying similar front-running tactics this time, and he can go one better. 2. REMATCH is a quality gelding who has recently relocated from NSW, and he made an encouraging local debut over an unsuitable 1300m. He is expected to improve sharply, stepping up in distance, and he has never missed a cheque second up in the past, including a win. Stick with him. 4. VANGUARD LEGEND was not far away in the same race as the top pick and, with a more favourable draw this time, he looks capable of a top 3 finish. 3. HETTINGER will be peaking at the right time, and he boasts an excellent record over this course and distance and is too good to overlook, while 1. ICHIBAN is chasing consecutive wins after a determined last-start win in a similar field. Don't risk him.
